creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Pedro F. Giffuni from comment #18)
> The port's post-patch target (actually taken from the coinmp port) sets 
> ${PREFIX}/libdata/pkgconfig in Ipopt/Makefile.in
> 
> It looks like that has to be changed also in ipopt-uninstalled.pc.in

I tried it by changing popt-uninstalled.pc.in only, same problem.
